summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification shard. No shared canonical was selected; hydrated PRs are classified independently using the preflight artifact. No mutating close, merge, label, comment, or fix actions are planned because the job blocks merge/fix/raise_pr, low-signal closeout is disabled, and no candidate is boringly duplicate/superseded from the hydrated evidence.
